title: Chapter 13
content:

Ethan couldn't help but chuckle at the sight. Alex had always been a curious soul, eager to learn about everything and everyone. He raised his hand and shouted, "Yoo!" The sound echoed down the hallway, and Alex's head snapped up, his eyes lighting up seeing Ethan.

"Ethan, you're here!" Alex's smile was brighter than the sun, his cheeks rounding with excitement.

Ethan grinned as he approached. "Yeah, I am, buddy," he said, slapping Alex on the back. "What's got you so distracted?"

Alex's cheeks flushed slightly as he turned to face Ethan. "Just checking out the new meat," he said, jerking his thumb towards the classroom. "Transfer student or something. She's a real head-turner."

Ethan's curiosity was piqued. "Let's go in," he said. The room was filled with the murmur of students talking and shuffling papers. They spotted the new student immediately - a girl with a mane of grayish-purple hair that cascaded to her shoulders. Her body was a tantalizing mix of curves and softness, her bosom straining against her tight t-shirt, hips thick and inviting. A guy with a horse-like face and an arrogant smirk was leaning against the desk beside her, his arms folded across his chest as if he owned the place.

They found two empty seats near the back, the perfect spot for them to keep an eye on the gray-haired beauty without seeming too eager. The chatter around them grew louder as more students filed in, and Ethan's cock stirred in his pants. He couldn't help but think about the delicious ways he'd love to bend that curvy body to his will.

Alex leaned over, whispering in his ear, "Dude, you okay? You're sweating like a pig."

Ethan glared at him. "Shut up, man," he hissed. "It's just...it's hot in here."

Alex chuckled, not fooled for a second. "Yeah, sure. It's totally not because you've got the hots for the new girl."

Ethan felt his face heat up. "I don't know what you're talking about," he murmured, his eyes sliding back to the front of the room where the new student was sitting, her back to them, surrounded by a group of eager fans.

Alex snorted. "Sure, you don't," he said, his eyes twinkling with amusement. "But if you ever want to get a piece of that, you're gonna have to work for it."

"What's her name?" Ethan asked, his voice low.

"Not sure," Alex whispered back. "But she's in our history class. You'll get plenty of chances to make your move."

The professor cleared her throat, and the room fell silent. Ethan's eyes snapped to the front of the room, where Mrs. Salina stood, a stern look on her beautiful face. She was a MILF, all right, with a body that didn't quit and a set of tits that had haunted his dreams more than once. She had a way of commanding a room that was both intimidating and incredibly sexy. Her black high-waisted pencil skirt hugged her thick thighs, and the white top she wore did nothing to hide the outline of her big, round tits.

"Alright, class," she began, her voice a smooth purr that made Ethan's cock twitch.

The beauty and the horse-face guy stood up simultaneously. "Hi, I'm Lisa," she said, her voice a sweet melody that sent a shiver down Ethan's spine. "I just moved here with my family."

The guy next to her smirked. "And I'm Tobi," he said, his voice smoother than melted chocolate. "Lisa's my sister. We're both looking forward to a fresh start here at Weston."

Ethan felt a wave of relief wash over him. Sister, not girlfriend. He could work with that. The thought of having to deal with a clingy girlfriend while trying to get into her pants was not appealing.

The class murmured their hellos and Mrs. Salina nodded. "Welcome to both of you. I hope you'll find your time here enlightening. Now, let's get to today's lecture."

Lisa sat down, her eyes catching Ethan's for a brief moment. She offered a small, shy smile before focusing on the professor. Ethan felt his cock throb at the sight of her pink, plump lips and the way she tucked a stray lock of hair behind her ear. He was lost in thought, contemplating the delicate curve of her neck and the way her tits bounced slightly as she sat.

Thinking of Lisa's big round boobs and those juicy red lips, Ethan murmured to himself, "What the hell?" He reached down to give his already throbbing cock a squeeze through his pants, whispering, "_I think I will go crazy for sure today!"

" First Luna and now Lisa_?" "Arghh__ some one save me.... ;]" The sensation sent a shiver down his spine, and he had to forcefully remind himself that he was in the middle of class.
